category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Qatar market (QGOSM conformity / registration under MOCI, GSO standards adopting EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, Ministry of Labour occupational framework, importer-of-record obligations).

title.en: China-to-Qatar PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入卡塔尔（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入卡塔爾（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Qatar market requirements: QGOSM conformity and registration under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry, GSO standards adopting EN 149:2001+A1:2009 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Ministry of Labour occupational-safety framework, importer-of-record obligations, and Arabic/English labelling for products entering through Hamad Port.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与卡塔尔市场要求对照，涵盖商业和工业部（MOCI）下QGOSM的合格评定与注册、采纳EN 149:2001+A1:2009（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的GSO标准、劳工部职业安全框架、进口商责任，以及经哈马德港进入的产品的阿拉伯文/英文标签要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與卡塔爾市場要求對照，涵蓋商業和工業部（MOCI）下QGOSM的合格評定與註冊、採納EN 149:2001+A1:2009（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的GSO標準、勞工部職業安全框架、進口商責任，以及經哈馬德港進入的產品的阿拉伯文/英文標籤要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Qatar law, QGOSM and GSO requirements, Ministry of Labour occupational rules, and Qatari customs and market-surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行卡塔尔法律、QGOSM及GSO要求、劳工部职业规则，以及卡塔尔海关与市场监督实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行卡塔爾法律、QGOSM及GSO要求、勞工部職業規則，以及卡塔爾海關與市場監督實踐。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators entering Qatar are assessed against GSO standards that adopt EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3); conformity and product registration are handled by the Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM) under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry, with occupational use governed by the Ministry of Labour framework. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) and GB 19083 test reports do not by themselves satisfy the EN 149 basis Qatar relies on. A locally established importer-of-record is required, and labelling must include Arabic alongside English. Surgical/medical masks follow the national health-regulator route, not the PPE route.
answer_first.zh: 进入卡塔尔的FFP呼吸器依据采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的GSO标准评定；合格评定与产品注册由商业和工业部下的卡塔尔标准与计量总局（QGOSM）负责，职业使用受劳工部框架监管。中国KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083检测报告本身不满足卡塔尔所依据的EN 149基础。须有在当地设立的进口商，且标签须在英文之外包含阿拉伯文。外科/医用口罩走国家卫生监管机构路径，而非PPE路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入卡塔爾的FFP呼吸器依據採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的GSO標準評定；合格評定與產品註冊由商業和工業部下的卡塔爾標準與計量總局（QGOSM）負責，職業使用受勞工部框架監管。中國KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083檢測報告本身不滿足卡塔爾所依據的EN 149基礎。須有在當地設立的進口商，且標籤須在英文之外包含阿拉伯文。外科/醫用口罩走國家衛生監管機構路徑，而非PPE路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official QGOSM / MOCI / GSO / Ministry of Labour sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
